backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that defines data types and CRUD operations for Poetry, Dua, Song, and UserProfile entities, with access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage. Also manages user records, maintenance mode, and counter-based ID generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the /admin route renders PINAuthGuard independently of main app authentication, with high confidence based on Layout.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the app's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif', linking the app logo favicon and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for /, /login, /poetry, /dua, /songs, and /admin, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: An admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with per-item delete functionality backed by confirmation dialogs and query invalidation.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: A form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress via a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: A form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress with a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A form component for admins to upload songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, tracking upload progress and using the createSong mutation to submit data.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: An admin panel component for managing users (search, block/unblock) and toggling maintenance mode, using React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, volume enforcement (always 1.0/unmuted), MediaSession integration, AudioContext focus, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component shown to suspended users, displaying a ShieldX icon and a WhatsApp deep-link button to contact the admin.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Renders a card component for a single Dua post with like, download, copy, and share functionality, plus a full-screen modal on click.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: Displays a full-screen modal overlay for a Poetry or Dua post, showing its title, content, optional image, audio player, and like count while tracking history.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Slide-out hamburger menu panel that shows browsing history and offline downloads, with playback and delete controls for downloaded audio.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout wrapper that handles credential checks, ban/maintenance state, navigation guards, theme toggling, and renders the bottom nav bar.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen maintenance notice UI with an animated wrench icon and bouncing dots, displayed when the app is under maintenance.
Full-screen music player modal that auto-plays the selected song, shows album art, a seek slider, play/pause controls, and tracks playback history.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard component that wraps children behind a hardcoded 8-digit PIN, persisting auth state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a poetry post with like, share, copy, and image download actions, plus a full-screen modal view.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a song post with inline play/pause, like, share, and copy actions, plus a now-playing modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: A hook managing global singleton audio playback state including play/pause/seek, wake lock, MediaSession metadata, and audio permission checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: A hook that manages offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: A hook that manages playback history entries in IndexedDB, providing functions to add and refresh history records.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD and like operations on Poetry, Dua, Songs, and User records, each using the backend actor and invalidating relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook that previously managed a Web Audio filter chain; all methods are now no-ops since audio plays directly via HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and typography classes for Urdu/Nastaliq and poetry content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-guarded admin panel with tabbed sections for uploading Poetry/Dua/Song content, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all Dua entries in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter a name and select a server, generating a device fingerprint and registering via the backend before navigating to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Home feed page that aggregates Poetry, Dua, and Song content into a chronologically sorted, filterable list, and displays the logged-in user's unique identity code.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of poetry posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and empty state messages.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of song posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and empty state messages.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helper functions for initializing the database and performing CRUD operations on browsing history and downloaded content stores.
frontend/src/utils/timeAgo.ts: Converts an Internet Computer nanosecond timestamp (bigint) into a human-readable relative time string such as '3 days ago'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-query/animate plugins, Urdu font family, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, known issues, and a pending fix request to allow shared admin panel URLs to render the PIN auth guard instead of redirecting to the main app.
